codeReview.summary: The reviewed commit implements the scoped shell-a11y/footer polish changes and aligns with the feature expectations: FileSelector remains keyboard-accessible (Enter/Space with focusability), the dropzone now has tooltip text, AppHeader theme toggle moved to dedicated icon-button styling, AppHeader new-window tooltip is present, and App layout uses a flex-growing main region under a min-h-screen flex-column shell so the footer can pin on short pages. The remaining requirements (decorative SVG aria-hidden audit and FilterBar export aria-label) are satisfied in the reviewed frontend state.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker procedure for UI verification assumes starting a fresh `cargo run &`, but does not document an explicit fallback when the manifest port is already occupied by a healthy project server, which led to a recorded procedure deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill `/Users/vriesd/projects/csv-align/.factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md` step 5 says to start Axum (`cargo run &`). Handoff `2026-04-18T03-07-36-286Z__m6-a11y-and-footer-polish__92eebb98-fcb5-4839-8117-4a608be769fc.json` `skillFeedback.deviations` notes `AddrInUse` and reuse of an already-healthy server.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Guidance for agent-browser file-upload flows with hidden file inputs is not captured in shared testing docs/skill, which caused ad-hoc DOM-manipulation steps during validation and was explicitly called out by the worker.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The same handoff `skillFeedback.suggestedChanges` requests documenting hidden-input upload handling. Transcript skeleton for worker session `92eebb98-fcb5-4839-8117-4a608be769fc` includes browser Execute steps described as temporarily manipulating DOM styles to expose hidden file inputs before upload.

summary: Reviewed feature `m6-a11y-and-footer-polish` at commit `3a63193`; implementation matches the feature scope and expected behavior, so this scrutiny review passes. Two shared-state observations were recorded around frontend-worker/user-testing guidance for service reuse and hidden-file-input browser validation.
